_comment: Language_En.json - English baseline for TheAssetEditor localization
_comment2: All keys must be present in Language_Cn.json and Language_Fr.json as well
MenuBar.Help.VideoTutorials.AnimatedProp: Animated Props and Custom Animation Packs
SettingsWindow.OnlyLoadLod0: Only load Lod0 for reference meshes
SettingsWindow.Title: Settings
UpdaterWindow.Title: Updater
UpdaterWindow.UpdateInfo:
A new version of AssetEditor is available!

Your current version is {0}. Update to version {1} to get the latest changes detailed below.
Shared.TextInput.Title: TextInputWindow
Shared.CustomException.Title: Error
Shared.CustomException.InfoText:
If this error was unexpected, please press the copy button and provide the text dump to the developers through discord or github.
The Clipboard contains more information then what is displayed! 
 
Discord: https://discord.gg/moddingden 
Github: https://github.com/donkeyProgramming/TheAssetEditor/issues
Shared.SavePackFile.Title: SavePackFileWindow
Shared.PackFileBrowser.Title: PackFile Explorer
Shared.PackFileBrowserWindow.Title: PackFileBrowserWindow
Shared.SelectionList.Name: Name
Shared.ToolSelector.Title: Tool Selector
Shared.ControllerHost.Title: ControllerHostWindow
AudioFilesExplorer.SetAudioFiles.ToolTip: Set the selected audio files as the audio files in the Settings.
AudioFilesExplorer.AddToAudioFiles.ToolT: Add the selected audio files to the audio files already set in the Settings.
AudioProjectEditor.AddRow.ToolTip: Adds the row to the Audio Project. Shortcut: Ctrl + Q
Shows only modded states in the drop downs rather than modded states and vanilla states.
AudioProjectExplorer.EventTypeFilterTool: Dialogue Event Type refers to the type of action or trigger in game that the Dialogue Event relates to.
AudioProjectExplorer.EventProfileFilterT: The Dialogue Event profile refers to the profile to filter by.
AudioProjectExplorer.ShowEditedItemsOnly: Filters the Audio Project Explorer tree to show only items that have been edited.
AudioProjectExplorer.ShowActionEvents.To: Filters the Audio Project Explorer tree to show or hide Action Events.
Filters the Audio Project Explorer Tree to show or hide Dialogue Events.
AudioProjectViewer.EditRow.ToolTip: Removes the selected row from the Audio Project and adds it to the Audio Project Editor. Shortcut: Ctrl + E
AudioProjectViewer.RemoveRow.ToolTip: Removes the selected row(s) from the Audio Project. Shortcuts: Delete / Backspace
AudioProjectViewer.RowToolTip: To edit or remove rows select them. To copy and paste rows (Dialogue Events rows only) select them and right-click or use the shortcuts: Copy: Ctrl + C, Paste: Ctrl + V
AudioProjectViewer.DisabledRowToolTip: This row cannot be selected directly, it is controlled by the corresponding "Play_..." Action Event.
AudioSettings.Label: Settings
AudioSettings.SetRecommendedVO.ToolTip: When multiple audio files are set, this sets the container's settings to what is recommended for a container containing VO audio files. Shortcut: Ctrl + R
AudioSettings.RemoveAudioFiles.ToolTip: Remove the selected Audio Files from the Settings.
AudioSettings.ShowSettingsFromViewer: Show Settings from Audio Project Viewer
AudioSettings.ShowSettingsFromViewer.Too: When selecting items in the Audio Project Viewer with the selected the settings displayed will be that item's settings.
AudioSettings.ContainerType.ToolTip: The Container Type determines the order in which objects are played.
AudioSettings.RandomType.ToolTip: Random - Plays objects at random. Shuffle - Plays objects at random without repeating.
AudioSettings.NumberOfLoops.ToolTip: Number of times the audio will loop.
DialogueEventMerger.Title: Dialogue Event Merger
DialogueEventMerger.Description: The Dialogue Event Merger is a tool for merging Dialogue Events from modded SoundBanks with Dialogue Events from vanilla into a single SoundBank.
AudioProjectMerger.Title: Audio Project Merger
AudioProjectMerger.Description: The Audio Project Merger is a tool for merging two Audio Projects.
AudioProjectMerger.MergedName.ToolTip: The name of your merged Audio Project.
AudioProjectMerger.OutputDirectory.ToolT: The pack directory where the merged Audio Project is output to.
AudioProjectMerger.BaseAudioProject.Tool: The path to the Audio Project that you want to merge the Merging Audio Project into.
AudioProjectMerger.MergingAudioProject.T: The path to the Audio Project that you want to merge into the base Audio Project.
AudioProjectConverter.Title: Audio Project Converter
AudioProjectConverter.Description: The Audio Project Converter is a tool for creating an Audio Project out of Dialogue Events in the provided .bnk files.
AudioProjectConverter.AudioProjectName.T: The name of your converted Audio Project.
AudioProjectConverter.OutputDirectory.To: The pack directory where the converted Audio Project is output to.
AudioProjectConverter.VOActorSubstring.T: A substring common to all the VO Actor keys whose usage you want converted.
AudioProjectConverter.WemsDirectory.Tool: A directory containing all the .wem files used in the soundbank.
AudioProjectConverter.BnksDirectory.Tool: A directory containing all the .bnk files to be searched.
AudioProjectConverter.ConvertingFromWwis: Tick this box if you need to get the States used in the soundbank from the Wwise project.
NewAudioProject.Title: New Audio Project
NewAudioProject.Name: Name
NewAudioProject.Name.ToolTip: The name of the Audio Project.
NewAudioProject.Location.ToolTip: The folder location in the Pack the Audio Project should go.
NewAudioProject.Language.ToolTip: The game language of your Audio Project.
ImportWindow.Title: ImportWindow
ExportWindow.Title: Export
RmvToGltfImporter.ConvertMaterialMap: Convert Material Map From Blender To TW format
RmvToGltfImporter.ConvertNormalMap: Convert Normal Map From Blue To Orange Type
RmvToGltfImporter.KeySamplesPerSecond: Number of Key Samples Per Second
AnimReTarget.SkeletonScale.ToolTip: Scaling the skeleton will make the mesh look dragged unless the mesh is also exported
AnimReTarget.ApplyRelativeScale.ToolTip: Scale bone length based on relative difference
AnimReTarget.ZeroUnmappedBones.ToolTip: Set the transform of all unmapped bones to 0
AnimReTarget.RootBoneWarBeast: Root bone for animation war beast convert operation
AnimKeyframe.Title: Animation Key Frame Editor
AnimKeyframe.DragBorderHint: <-- Drag the border to reveal the buttons text
AnimKeyframe.WarningDirty: WARNING: Do not change the rider animation before saving, otherwise you will lose progress
AnimKeyframe.CurrentlyEditingFrame: You are currently editing frame Nr:
AnimKeyframe.IncrementFrameAfterCopy: Increment the frame after copy operation
AnimKeyframe.SelectPreviousBonesOnFrameC: Select previous bones when frame changed
AnimKeyframe.EnableIK: Enable Inverse Kinematics (currently not completed, help needed!)
AnimKeyframe.LastEndBonesChain: Last end of the bones chain (for IK):
AnimKeyframe.PastePoseSelectedNodes: Paste Pose into previously selected nodes
AnimKeyframe.CopyNPastePrevEdited: Copy n paste previous edited nodes
AnimKeyframe.InRangeCopyDesc: In range copy operations from other keyedframe editor window. It will copy current frame and then paste in the destination animation up to desired length
AnimKeyframe.DontWarnDifferentSkeletons: Don't warn if the skeletons are different
AnimKeyframe.DontWarnIncomingFramesBigge: Don't warn if the incoming total frames > this animation total frames
AnimKeyframe.PasteUsingFormBelow: When pasting use the frame number ranges below, otherwise it will paste whole frames
AnimKeyframe.PastePoseSelectedGlobalClip: Paste Pose into previously selected nodes from global clipboard...
AnimKeyframe.InterpolationDesc: Drag the slider to manipulate the blending between frames, to apply to the current frame, click apply interpolation on current frame. To enable preview you need to select frame A and B.
AnimKeyframe.ApplyInterpolationAcrossAB: Apply interpolation across frame A to B
AnimKeyframe.InterpolationOnlySelectedBo: Interpolation only on previously selected bones
AnimKeyframe.InRangeCopyOperationsLine1: In range copy operations from other keyedframe editor window.
AnimKeyframe.InRangeCopyOperationsLine2: It will copy current frame and then paste in the destination animation up to desired length
AnimKeyframe.InterpolationApplyHint: To apply to the current frame, click apply interpolation on current frame.
AnimKeyframe.InterpolationDragSlider: Drag the slider to manipulate the blending between frames
AnimKeyframe.InterpolationPreviewHint: To enable preview you need to select frame A and B.
MetaData.TagDesc.SNIP: Snip the starting and ending frame of an animation
MetaData.TagDesc.FULL_BODY: Indicates that this animation should be full body, that is, not torso spliced
MetaData.TagDesc.NOT_BUILDING: Indicates that this animation cannot be used for attacking buildings
MetaData.TagDesc.USE_BASE_METADATA: Force the use of metadata in the base anim slot during a hardcoded splice. All metadata in the hardcoded splice slot is ignored.
MetaData.TagDesc.IGNORE_FOOT_SLIDING: Mark the animation as not affected by foot sliding, so don't do anything to try to correct it.
MetaData.TagDesc.WEAPON_ON: Weapon bone is displayed between start and end times; set value to weapon bone index
MetaData.TagDesc.WEAPON_LHAND: Weapon bone is spliced relative to left hand between start and end times; set value to weapon bone index
MetaData.TagDesc.WEAPON_RHAND: Weapon bone is spliced relative to right hand between start and end times; set value to weapon bone index
MetaData.TagDesc.WEAPON_HIP: Weapon bone is spliced relative to hip between start and end times; set value to weapon bone index
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_LHAND: Dock equipment to the left hand (hand_left bone)
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_RHAND: Dock equipment to the right hand (hand_right bone)
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_LHAND_2: Dock equipment to the second left hand slot
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_RHAND_2: Dock equipment to the second right hand slot
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_LWAIST: Dock equipment to the left waist (root bone)
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_RWAIST: Dock equipment to the right waist (root bone)
MetaData.TagDesc.DOCK_EQPT_BACK: Weapon bone is spliced relative to spine2 between start and end times; set value to weapon bone index
MetaData.TagDesc.BLEND_OVERRIDE: Override the blend method and blend time
MetaData.TagDesc.DISABLE_PERSISTENT_ID: Disable persistent metadata with a particular ID
MetaData.TagDesc.MIN_TARGET_SIZE: Can only use this animation against target larger or equal to this size
MetaData.TagDesc.MAX_TARGET_SIZE: Can only use this animation against target smaller or equal to this size
MetaData.TagDesc.RIDER_CUSTOM_ANIMATION: Force the rider to play a custom animation
MetaData.TagDesc.DISTANCE: Distance in cm; currently used for jump animations
MetaData.TagDesc.IMPACT_SPEED: On attack animations, speed of the strike; On death animations, speed change threshold to trigger animation
MetaData.TagDesc.ALPHA: Change the alpha value. 0 = invisible, 1 = visible.
MetaData.TagDesc.RIDER_IDLE_SPEED_SCALE: Scale the rider animation speed with some factor
MetaData.TagDesc.ALLOWED_DELTA_SCALE: Maximum allowed delta scale to use the animation
MetaData.TagDesc.PERSISTENT_SPEED_SCALE: Change the speed of the persistent metadata
MetaData.TagDesc.BOUNDING_VOLUME_OVERRID: A scale factor for the bounding sphere. This is a workaround for if the character animates far from the origin (or spreads out) and is being culled by the camera.
MetaData.TagDesc.FIRE_POS: Position where projectile is created; start time is the time of projectile spawn
MetaData.TagDesc.IMPACT_POS: Position where impact originates; start time is the time of impact
MetaData.TagDesc.CAMERA_SHAKE_POS: Start a camera shake at position
MetaData.TagDesc.WOUNDED_POSE: Specify the wounded pose in the last frame
MetaData.TagDesc.DISMEMBER: Triggers dismembering at the start time
MetaData.TagDesc.SPLICE: Splices animation specified in metadata to this animation. Weights range from 0 to 1.
MetaData.TagDesc.SPLICE_OVERRIDE: Override hardcoded splice. Weights range from 0 to 1.
MetaData.TagDesc.TRANSFORM: Transform a node. Optionally override with another bone
MetaData.TagDesc.EFFECT: Trigger a particle effect at a location relative to a node index
MetaData.TagDesc.BLOOD: Trigger a blood effect at a location relative to a node index
MetaData.TagDesc.VOLUMETRIC_EFFECT: Trigger a volumetric particle effect group
MetaData.TagDesc.PROP: Display a prop model at a location relative to a node index
MetaData.TagDesc.ANIMATED_PROP: Display an animated prop model at a location relative to a node index
MetaData.TagDesc.RIDER_ATTACHMENT: Mark an attachment point for a rider
MetaData.TagDesc.TURRET_ATTACHMENT: Mark an attachment point for a turret
MetaData.TagDesc.SPLASH_ATTACK: Trigger a splash attack and mark the area of effect
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_IMPACT: Time with attack and defend sound types
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_ATTACK_TYPE: Attack type of this combat animation
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_DEFEND_TYPE: Defend type of this combat animation
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_SPHERE_LINK: Link this entity with the spheres of matched combatants
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_BUILDING: Time, event and position of sound to be triggered
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_TRIGGER: Time and type of sound to be triggered
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_SPHERE: Time and type of sound sphere to be triggered
MetaData.TagDesc.SOUND_POSITION: Position and orientation for sound playback
MetaData.TagDesc.CANNOT_DISMEMBER: Mark an attack as not causing dismemberment
MetaData.TagDesc.ALLOW_LEG_DISMEMBER: Allow leg dismemberment during this animation
MetaData.TagDesc.ALLOW_FRONT_LEG_DISMEMB: Allow front leg dismemberment during this animation
MetaData.TagDesc.FACEFX: Face FX animation data for facial expressions
MetaData.TagDesc.NOT_HERO_TARGET: Indicates this animation cannot target hero units
MetaData.TagDesc.MARK_RIGHT_FOOT_FRONT: Mark right foot as the front foot
MetaData.TagDesc.NOT_REGULAR_TARGET: Indicates this animation cannot target regular units
MetaData.TagDesc.MATERIAL_FLAG: Set a material flag during the animation
MetaData.TagDesc.FREEZE_WEAPON: Freeze weapon in its current state
MetaData.TagDesc.RIDER_ANIMATION_REQUIRE: Mark the mount animation as needing a synced rider animation in the corresponding rider slot
MetaData.TagDesc.SHADER_PARAMETER: Modify specified shader parameter. Blends between two closest values.
MetaData.TagDesc.EJECT_ATTACHED: Eject the attached riders. Defines the direction of ejection (2D, Y is ignored).
MetaData.PropTip.VfxName: Name of the VFX's .xml file in the vfx folder. Leave off the file extension. Note that for this you don't need to add custom vfx to the particles db table and they still require a "movie"-type .pack for them to be loaded.
MetaData.PropTip.NodeIndex: Bone the effect is attached to, use -1 for it to just spawn and not follow animations
MetaData.PropTip.GenericBoneIndex: -1 applies the whole animation? | The spliced animation applies to this bone and all of its children. -1 seems to be the same as 0, ie. animroot.
MetaData.PropTip.BlendMethod: blend_in_default (0), blend_out_default (1), blend_in_crossfade (2), blend_out_crossfade (3), blend_in_time (4), blend_out_time (5)
MetaData.PropTip.OverrideProp: none (0), projectile (1), weapon_1 (2), weapon_2 (3), weapon_3 (4), weapon_4 (5), weapon_5 (6), weapon_6 (7)
MetaData.PropTip.DesiredAlpha: This might be a percentage, 0 = invisible and 1 = visible.
MetaData.PropTip.FirePosition: Measured from the unit's animroot bone, in meters.
MetaData.PropTip.TargetNode: ID of the bone which you are moving or rotating.
MetaData.PropTip.MaxTargetSize: Likely an enum related to unit size. Maybe 0=large, 1=medium, 2=small, 3=very_large, 4=very_small
MetaData.PropTip.PathToAnotherAnim: This works in pair with MetaData
MetaData.PropTip.Position: 3D position measured from animroot bone, in meters
MetaData.PropTip.Orientation: Orientation as Euler angles in degrees
MainNode.Name: Name
Mesh.Name: Name

FbxImport.SkeletonName.ToolTip: Skeleton name stored in .FBX File. Used in the .rigid_model_v2. Enter name manually if needed.
BoneMappingWindow.Title: Bone Mapping Window
AnimBatchExport.Note: Note: Can not batch process the active packfile

Msg.UnsavedChangesOnQuit: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to quit without saving?

Msg.UnableToLoadAllCAPackfiles: Unable to load all CA packfiles in {0}
Msg.NoObjectSelected: No object was selected. Select an object first then you can select the bone
Msg.NoAnimationPlaying: No animation was played. Select a frame by scrubbing the animation using the control below
Msg.NoOutputPackfile: No output packfile selected. Please set Editable pack before running the converter
Msg.ConverterWillReplace: The converter will replace any file with overlapping names in the output folder. Are you sure?

Msg.NoBoneSelected: No bone selected - Please select a bone first
Msg.NoMeshBoneSelected: No mesh bone selected - Please select a bone first
Msg.NoParentModelBoneSelected: No parent model bone selected - Please select a bone first
Msg.SelectBothKeyframes: Keyframe A and B must be selected to use this tool
Msg.IKSingleBoneOnly: When IK mode is enabled, pick only 1 bone. Deselect the rest of the bones.
Msg.IKSameChain: Head bone chain == tail bone chain. Why even enable IK mode?
Msg.ScaleModeIKConflict: Cannot use scale mode when IK is enabled!
Msg.ClipboardParseFailed: Cannot parse the clipboard. It is not in asset editor frame format.
Msg.SkeletonMismatch: The clipboard skeleton is {0} but the target skeleton (which you are editing right now) is {1}. This will cause something to break if both skeletons are radically different.
Msg.PasteTooLong: It is too long {0} frames, the animation frames length is {1}.
Msg.RemoveFrameConfirm: Remove this frame at {0}? It is NOT recommended to remove a frame as this is a destructive operation
Msg.CannotResetNewFrame: Cannot reset the frame as this is a new frame!
Msg.InvalidDecimalInput: Please input proper decimal number in the textbox
Msg.FeatureNotAvailable: Not available yet, in the meantime you can do it manually using the slider
Msg.SaveWithVersion: This will save with anim version {0}
Msg.FragmentSkeletonMismatch: This fragment does not fit the current skeleton
Msg.AnimationMustBePlaying: An animation must be playing for this tool to work
Msg.UnexpectedSkeletonCount: Unexpected number of skeletons - {0}. This tool only works for one skeleton
Msg.InvalidBonesInMesh: Mesh has invalid bones, this might cause issues. It's a result of an invalid re-rigging
Msg.AudioProjectNameSpaces: You must rename the Audio Project as its name contains spaces which is not allowed.
Msg.DeleteAndRecompileWems: Delete all your existing WEMs and then recompile the Audio Project as all WEM IDs have now been updated.

AnimReTarget.FreezeRotationZ.ToolTip: Set the bone rotation to 0,0, to some rotation Z at frame 1
AnimReTarget.SnapWorldspace.ToolTip: Sets the bone transform to the same as the target, no magic attempted
ShaderTexture.RemoveTexture: Remove texture and replace with default mask
RmvToGltfImporter.ToolTip.ImportMeshes: Make a TW WH3/3K compatible material from a Blender Material Map
RmvToGltfImporter.ToolTip.ImportMaterial: Import Materials From RMV File, convert to TW material
RmvToGltfImporter.ToolTip.ConvertMateria: Make a TW WH3/3K compatible material from a Blender Material Map
RmvToGltfImporter.ToolTip.ConvertNormalM: Convert the normal map texture from blue type into orange type.
RmvToGltfImporter.ToolTip.ImportAnimatio: Import Animations From GLTF File, convert to TW ANIM
RmvToGltfExporter.ToolTip.ConvertMateria: Convert the Material texture into the version Blender prefers
RmvToGltfExporter.ToolTip.ConvertNormal: Convert the normal map texture into blue version - used by a lot of software, including blender
DialogueEventMerger.SoundBankSuffix.Tool: The suffix of your merged SoundBanks.
DialogueEventMerger.ModdedSoundBanks.Too: Select one or more modded SoundBanks from which their Dialogue Events will be merged with vanilla.
AudioProjectMerger.MergedName.ToolTip: The name of your merged Audio Project.
AudioProjectMerger.OutputDirectory.ToolT: The pack directory where the merged Audio Project is output to. There needs to be a file in the directory for it to show.
AudioProjectMerger.BaseAudioProject.Tool: The path to the Audio Project that you want to merge the Merging Audio Project into.
AudioProjectMerger.MergingAudioProject.T: The path to the Audio Project that you want to merge into the base Audio Project.
AudioProjectConverter.AudioProjectName.T: The name of your converted Audio Project.
AudioProjectConverter.OutputDirectory.To: The pack directory where the converted Audio Project is output to. There needs to be a file in the directory for it to show.
AudioProjectConverter.VOActorSubstring.T: A substring common to all the VO Actor keys whose usage you want converted to the Audio Project format.
AudioProjectConverter.WemsDirectory.Tool: A directory containing all the .wem files used in the soundbank.
AudioProjectConverter.BnksDirectory.Tool: A directory containing all the .bnk files to be searched.
AudioProjectConverter.ConvertingFromWwis: Tick this box if you need to get the States used in the soundbank from the Wwise project.
AudioSettings.AlwaysResetContainer.ToolT: Always Reset Container determines whether playback continues or returns to the start of the playlist when a container is replayed after being stopped during playback.
